Rate the risk level and identify control measures: mechanical aids (trolleys, pump trucks), team lifting protocols, ergonomic adjustments, training requirements. Include specific guidance for supporting pupils with physical disabilities (moving and handling plans linked to individual risk assessments). Output a complete manual handling risk assessment with a task-by-task matrix, a staff training record template, and a guidance note on when a personal moving and handling plan is required.
